name: Web Defacement via Content Modification
description: Detects modification of web server content files indicative of defacement
query:
// Detect web content file modifications
// Trigger on writes to web root directories
events from endpoint
where event_type = "file_write"
  and file_path matches "(?i)(wwwroot|htdocs|www|public_html|nginx/html).*\.(html|htm|php|asp|jsp|index)$"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 5
within 120 seconds
